500.description: Failed to persist or apply configuration

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: RFC 3339 cursor from the previous page

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Session status filter: active, completed, or errored

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum sessions to return, clamped from 1 to 200

MessageHandle.description:
Handle returned by `ChannelGateway::reply`, used to edit the message later
(progressive streaming, status updates, ...).

SessionId.description:
`SessionId` is the canonical identifier for a session.

Format for Slack: `"{channel}-{thread_ts}"`. Top-level Slack messages with
no `thread_ts` use the message's own `ts` (so each top-level @mention
becomes its own session).
